author: Jaksen
name: Checkpointed AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112
blurb: My strongest saved 8xH100-backed result to date. This folder preserves the public AR self-generated GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 record lineage while adding a checkpointed 8xH100->1xH100 execution path: Stage 1 trains and checkpoints on 8xH100, then Stage 2 runs GPTQ and sliding-window eval on 1xH100. Saved seed-314 result: 1.13071788 BPB at 15,651,808 bytes.
technique_summary: Inherited AR self-generated GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072x112 stack with a validated checkpointed two-stage 8xH100 to 1xH100 execution path
notes: Saved strongest 8xH100-backed result currently tracked in this repo. Useful because it proves the execution path, preserves recovered raw Stage 1 and Stage 2 logs, and avoids overclaiming inherited modeling ideas as new.
